query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_parts FROM spare_parts; SELECT COUNT(*) as total_compat FROM spare_parts_compatibility; SELECT DISTINCT modelName FROM spare_parts_compatibility WHERE modelName IS NOT NULL LIMIT 20;
